extraction.one_line_summary: BAIS David won from a 4-man breakaway given the stage after Desmein-controlled peloton showed zero interest in contesting the Gran Sasso finish.
tactical_patterns: Desmein controlled only to protect pink jersey, intentionally gifted mountain-top stage without contesting bonus seconds at finish.
Early 4-man breakaway established under 10km when brief selection fight was immediately extinguished, revealing peloton's complete disinterest.
KOM jersey holder deliberately dropped back to main group, prioritizing jersey relinquishment over breakaway fight at altitude finish.

rider_signals.BAIS David: positive: second stage win in only three Giro attempts demonstrates breakaway efficiency and finishing speed
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: showed strength in GC group but strategically avoided bonus second contest at 28s deficit
rider_signals.LIEMESSEN Jonas: positive: fourth consecutive day in pink extends his historical record for most Maglia Rosa days
